title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXIV. Lullabies.
content:
Tom shall have a new bonnet,
        With blue ribbands to tie on it,
        With a hush-a-bye and a lull-a-baby,
        Who so like to Tommy's daddy?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXXIV. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
